name: HIPAA Compliance Audit
description: Automated HIPAA compliance audit workflow that checks Protected Health Information (PHI) access patterns across systems. A code node collects PHI access logs, Riggs AI analyzes them for unauthorized or anomalous access patterns, and violations are routed through an approval gate before remediation tickets and regulatory notifications are issued. Compliant access is logged for audit trail purposes.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Splunk
required_integrations.reason: Query PHI access logs and identify unauthorized access patterns

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create violation tickets and track remediation for HIPAA findings

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify privacy officer and compliance team of HIPAA violations

config.description: Triggers daily HIPAA compliance audit of PHI access patterns

parameters.query: index=phi_access earliest=-24h | stats count by user, resource, action, source_ip | where count > 0

config.description: Query SIEM for all PHI access events in the past 24 hours

config.additional_instructions: Analyze PHI access logs for HIPAA violations including unauthorized access, excessive data retrieval, access outside normal hours, and access from unusual locations. Flag any minimum necessary violations.
config.description: AI-powered analysis of PHI access patterns against HIPAA requirements
Routes based on whether HIPAA violations were identified in PHI access patterns

config.approval_message:
HIPAA violations detected in PHI access audit. Please review findings and confirm for remediation and potential breach notification.

{{analyze_1.summary}}
config.description: Privacy officer reviews and confirms HIPAA violations before remediation actions are taken

parameters.summary: HIPAA Violation: Unauthorized PHI Access Detected

config.description: Create a remediation ticket for confirmed HIPAA violations
Alert compliance team about confirmed HIPAA violations

parameters.note: Daily HIPAA audit completed. No violations detected. All PHI access within authorized parameters.

config.description: Record clean audit result for compliance documentation
HIPAA compliance audit complete -- findings documented and routed
